scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.db:snapshot: DIR=db-snapshot-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S) && mkdir -p $DIR && fly ssh sftp get /app/server/data/drop-by.db $DIR/drop-by.db && fly ssh sftp get /app/server/data/drop-by.db-wal $DIR/drop-by.db-wal && fly ssh sftp get /app/server/data/drop-by.db-shm $DIR/drop-by.db-shm && echo "Snapshot saved to $DIR"
